# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This project is a Flask Sudoku game.

Coding Style:
- Use Python 3.10+
- Follow PEP 8
- Keep code modular
- Use reusable functions
- Separate Flask routes from Sudoku logic
- Preserve existing functionality while refactoring
- Use type hints
- Handle exceptions properly
- Generate Sudoku puzzles with exactly one unique solution
- Use pytest
- Keep HTML semantic
- Make CSS responsive
- Support Dark Mode
- Store leaderboard using browser Local Storage
